kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Exactly two of these are true: Fletcher goes with 13 coins; Eastcheap goes with 11 coins; Oldwall goes with Countess.
Between Blacksmith and Millpond, one goes with Rowan and the other with Wulfric.
Either Beatrix belongs to the Hill Ward or all members of the Ironmongers' Guild belong to the Hill Ward (but not both).
Millpond goes with exactly one of Edmund, Carpenter, or Cooper.
The artisan in Kingsford's levy is between the Mason and the artisan serving the Earl.
Either Carpenter goes with Edmund or someone in the River Ward goes with Blacksmith (but not both).
Bishop goes with exactly three of Aldric, Carpenter, Southgate, and 10 coins.
Exactly two members of the Joiners' Guild are in the Hill Ward.
13 coins goes with at least two of Rowan, Carpenter, and Oldwall.
Kingsford goes with exactly two of Beatrix, Blacksmith, and Baron.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Exactly two of these are true: Crappie goes with 15 lb; Cedarmere goes with 13 lb; Stillwater goes with Spoon.
Between Bass and Pinehollow, one goes with Royce and the other with Wade.
Either Esther belongs to the East Watershed or all members of the Catfish Family belong to the East Watershed (but not both).
Pinehollow goes with exactly one of Mabel, Bluegill, or Catfish.
The angler at Mossbank's weight is between the angler who landed the Perch and the angler using the Swimbait.
Either Bluegill goes with Mabel or someone in the North Watershed goes with Bass (but not both).
Jig goes with exactly three of Cody, Bluegill, Willowmere, and 12 lb.
Exactly two members of the Pike Family are in the East Watershed.
15 lb goes with at least two of Royce, Bluegill, and Stillwater.
Mossbank goes with exactly two of Esther, Bass, and Buzzbait.
